headline: These Dividend Stocks Pay More Than 10-Year Treasury Bonds
summary: Government bonds can provide steady income, but they might leave you with the nagging feeling that you can do better. After all, some dividend stocks not only provide a better yield than government bonds, but they also offer share-price appreciation. Right not, the annual interest rate on a 10-year U.S. Treasury bond is around 4%. ... These Dividend Stocks Pay More Than 10-Year Treasury Bonds

headline: Stagflation Fears Are Returning: Grab These 5 Safe High-Yield Dividend Kings Now
summary: If you were a big fan of “That ’70s Show,” get ready because we may soon get a revival, and it will likely not be as entertaining. Many across Wall Street feel that the looming specter of stagflation may be right around the corner, and with good reason. By definition, stagflation is a stagnant economy ... Stagflation Fears Are Returning: Grab These 5 Safe High-Yield Dividend Kings Now
